metadata.description: A virtual engineering team for solo founders — core skills (plan review, code review, automation pipelines, GTM, writing) plus modular stack experts (iOS, Android, Next.js, Python, LLM, Designer). Install what you need.

plugins.name: solopreneur-core
plugins.description: Core skills — plan review, code review loops, backlog management, GTM, writing, and thinking partners.

plugins.name: solopreneur-designer
plugins.description: UI/UX design expertise — designer agent and 10 vendored third-party design skills (taste-* archetype family + impeccable).

plugins.name: solopreneur-ios
plugins.description: iOS/macOS SwiftUI expertise — ios-dev agent, ios-patterns, and 23 vendored third-party skills (iphone-apps + asc-* App Store Connect CLI).

plugins.name: solopreneur-android
plugins.description: Android/Kotlin expertise — android-dev agent, android-patterns, and 39 vendored third-party skills (Compose / architecture / Gradle + 18 gplay-* Google Play Console CLI + 6 official Android team skills).

plugins.name: solopreneur-llm
plugins.description: LLM/LangGraph agent development expertise — llm-dev agent.
